production_orders.csv sum of 'Quantity' is 21,080 (contradicting 21,060). production_calendar.csv contains 19 'Working' days (contradicting 18). production_lines.csv and production_orders.csv verify 4 lines and 15 orders.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic production data calibrated to real BLS/ASM manufacturing metrics. The spreadsheet environment is seeded with 4 production lines and 15 distinct orders containing a total sum of 21,080 units (contradicting the metadata claim of 21,060). The included calendar spans 4 weeks in January 2025 and contains exactly 19 working days (contradicting the metadata claim of 18). Successful completion inherently requires adding Schedule, Utilization, and Revenue_Analysis sheets while implementing date calculations, multi-sheet references, conditional formatting, and a stacked bar chart.
